zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕1693-1704区间反复整理，整体仍运行在20日均线1645上方，说明中期趋势保持偏多，但短线动能略显收敛，多空进入均衡博弈阶段。

MACD指标维持正值24.95附近，显示多头动能仍占优势，但由于缺乏RSI确认，当前未进入明显超买区域，动能虽偏强但缺乏进一步放量加速信号，属于健康整理走势。

上方阻力重点关注1704前高，若有效突破并站稳，有望延伸至1720-1750区间；下方支撑位于1693短期低点及20日均线1645附近，该区域构成多头防守关键带。

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，在1690上方企稳可考虑轻仓顺势做多，若跌破1645则短线趋势转弱，应减少交易频率，避免在区间内追涨杀跌造成不必要回撤。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 1697, reflecting extremely low volatility after a muted 24-hour change. Price action is compressing just below the intraday high of 1704, showing hesitation at overhead resistance. Despite the sideways movement, structure remains mildly constructive as price holds above the 20-day SMA near 1646, suggesting the short-term trend still leans cautiously bullish with buyers defending dips.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but stable picture. MACD at 24.95 indicates positive underlying momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits crossover confirmation. RSI data is unavailable, reducing precision in overbought/oversold assessment. However, price stability above the rising 20-day SMA implies that momentum has not deteriorated. Overall conditions favor consolidation within a bullish-to-neutral regime rather than directional breakdown or acceleration.

Key support is located at 1690, with stronger structural support at the 20-day SMA around 1646, which remains critical for preserving the broader bullish framework. A deeper downside level sits near the psychological 1600 area. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 1704, where price has repeatedly stalled. A breakout could unlock upside extensions toward 1720 and 1750, marking the next liquidity zones.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Long positions are more favorable above 1704–1705 with confirmation, targeting 1720 and 1750 while using stops below 1690. Conversely, failure to hold 1690 would signal weakening structure and open downside exposure toward 1646. Until volatility expands, disciplined execution within this compression range remains the most efficient approach.
